case_title: CARRIE MCLAUGHLIN VS. UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCLAUGHLIN, CARRIE AS TO DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN, CARRIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $59.00) SERVED NOV-07-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CARRIE MCLAUGHLIN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC'S REPRESENTATIVES YUN FEI LIU (CEO) AND HAO QIU ZHEN (DRIVER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
